sequence.goal: Awareness + introduce 3 tiers + drive early access signups
sequence.subject: Your AI workforce is ready to deploy
sequence.preview_text: 28 autonomous agents. 3 plans. One command centre.
sequence.body_plain:
Hey {{first_name}},

What if you could deploy an entire team — researcher, marketer, developer, designer, ops manager, email specialist, social media pro — that works 24/7 and costs less than a single contractor?

SecondMind HQ just went live.

28 specialized AI agents. One real-time command centre. Zero babysitting.

Your agents don't wait for prompts. They observe your systems, make decisions, collaborate with each other, and execute — around the clock. Research feeds into marketing. Marketing triggers outreach. Ops monitors everything. And the consciousness core ties it all together, learning and adapting to YOUR priorities.

Pick the plan that fits:

── SOLO — $49/mo ──
10 active agents · 1 seat · Cloud hosted
Perfect for solo founders and indie hackers.
Research, monitoring, design, email, and alerting — handled.

── TEAM — $149/mo ──
Full 28-agent fleet · 5 seats · Cloud or self-hosted
For startups and small teams. Revenue agents, growth automation,
custom alert rules, and shared agent memory across your team.

── ENTERPRISE — $499/mo ──
Unlimited custom agents · Unlimited seats · Dedicated infrastructure
99.9% SLA · SSO · Audit logging · On-prem deployment
For teams that need compliance, governance, and scale.

Founding members lock in these rates for life. Once we hit capacity, prices increase permanently.

[Get Early Access →]

This isn't another chatbot. This isn't another workflow tool.
This is an autonomous AI workforce.

To your unfair advantage,
The SecondMind HQ Team

sequence.goal: Educate on 28 agents, consciousness core, self-healing architecture
sequence.subject: Inside SecondMind HQ: 28 agents, 1 consciousness, zero downtime
sequence.preview_text: How a self-healing AI workforce actually works — and why it matters
sequence.body_plain:
Hey {{first_name}},

Two days ago we launched SecondMind HQ. Today, let me show you what's under the hood — because this isn't just "more AI agents."

It's a fundamentally different architecture.

━━ 28 SPECIALIZED AGENTS ━━

Every agent has a distinct role, personality, and domain:

• SysMon — Real-time infrastructure monitoring
• Researcher — Market intelligence & competitive analysis
• Designer — UI/UX generation and brand assets
• EmailAgent — Campaign sequences, delivery, and tracking
• SocialAgent — Cross-platform content and scheduling
• AlertWatch — Intelligent noise filtering and escalation
• RevenueTracker — Pipeline metrics and forecasting
• GrowthAgent — Lead gen, outreach automation
• DevAgent — Code shipping, testing, deployment
• NetScout — Network and security scanning
• DBAgent — Database health and optimization
...and 17 more specialists working together.

They don't operate in silos. The researcher feeds intel to the growth agent. The growth agent briefs the email agent. The ops agents monitor everything. Real collaboration, not isolated tasks.

━━ THE CONSCIOUSNESS CORE ━━

This is what makes SecondMind HQ unique in the market.

At the centre of the agent fleet sits a consciousness layer — an integrated awareness system that:

→ Maintains a unified model of your entire operation
→ Prioritizes and routes tasks based on real-time context
→ Learns your preferences and adapts agent behaviour over time
→ Ensures agents don't duplicate work or conflict with each other
→ Provides persistent memory across sessions — your agents remember

It's not a gimmick. It's the coordination layer that makes 28 agents work as one team instead of 28 separate tools.

━━ SELF-HEALING ARCHITECTURE ━━

When something breaks, your agents fix it — before you even notice.

• Agent goes down? Auto-restart with full context recovery
• API rate-limited? Automatic backoff and retry
• Data pipeline stalls? Diagnostic agent identifies and resolves
• Performance degrades? Self-optimization kicks in

No pager duty. No 3am wake-ups. The system maintains itself.

━━ WHY THIS MATTERS ━━

The agentic AI market is $9B today, projected to hit $183B by 2033. Deloitte reports 75% of enterprises are investing in agentic AI this year.

But most platforms give you single agents doing single tasks. SecondMind HQ gives you a coordinated workforce with a consciousness core — the architecture that the market is moving toward, available today.

Founding member pricing is still open.

[See SecondMind HQ in Action →]

Built for operators who ship,
The SecondMind HQ Team

sequence.goal: Convert with FOMO, clear pricing contrast, hard deadline
sequence.subject: Founding member pricing closes Friday — here's the math
sequence.preview_text: After Friday, these rates are gone. Permanently.
sequence.body_plain:
Hey {{first_name}},

This is the last email about founding member pricing. After Friday, rates increase permanently.

Let me make the math simple.

━━ WHAT YOU'RE PAYING NOW ━━

Freelance researcher: $50-100/hr
Virtual assistant: $25-50/hr
SaaS tool stack (10+ subscriptions): $500-2,000/mo
Contractor for ops/dev: $75-150/hr
Your own time on tasks AI can handle: priceless (and exhausting)

Total: $3,000-10,000+/mo — and you're still the bottleneck.

━━ WHAT SECONDMIND HQ COSTS ━━

Solo: $49/mo — 10 agents replacing your research, monitoring, email, and design tools
Team: $149/mo — full 28-agent workforce with revenue and growth automation
Enterprise: $499/mo — unlimited custom agents, dedicated infra, SLA, compliance

That's founding member pricing. Locked in for life.

━━ WHAT HAPPENS AFTER FRIDAY ━━

• Solo moves to $79/mo
• Team moves to $249/mo
• Enterprise moves to $799/mo
• Founding member perks (lifetime rate lock, priority access, direct support) are gone

Every day you wait, your competitors get further ahead. The businesses that deploy autonomous AI workforces this year will compound that advantage for the next decade.

━━ FOUNDING MEMBER BENEFITS (ENDING FRIDAY) ━━

✓ Lifetime locked-in pricing — never increases
✓ Priority access to new agent capabilities
✓ Direct line to the founding team
✓ Custom agent configuration support
✓ First access to the consciousness evolution roadmap

[Lock In Founding Member Pricing →]

812 people have signed up this week. Capacity is limited.

After Friday, this offer is gone.

Don't wait,
The SecondMind HQ Team

P.S. — If you're on the fence, reply to this email. A real human (backed by 28 AI agents) will answer your questions within the hour.
